5.response: {"Q0":"I did for for about 3 trials of the planet after he left but I soon remembered. I did dig because of muscle memory and how long I had been playing the game"}

11.response: {"Q0":"Examines the ability to learn and adapt and how much note you take of things and how muscle memory works even when you have clearly been directed against doing something for your own benefit"}

0.response: {"Q0":"No not really, but I tried to take as little risks as possible whilst also maximising opportunity."}

7.response: {"Q0":"It didn't impact my motivation, I just carried on."}

9.response: {"Q0":"Digging felt more fun, but I was more focused on galaxies"}

2.response: {"Q0":"Not very often I would say, probably 25-35% of the time"}
